name: Larry Klayman
subject: Indict Joe Biden
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052493:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "Border Security") Fellow Patriot, **The crimes of Joe Biden are _undeniable and multiplying_ , as he commits willful border crimes and floods hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens into America, endangering lives and threatening the nation's existence.** **[Will you help us INDICT Biden for his crimes and bring him to JUSTICE?](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052493:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "Will you help us INDICT Biden for his crimes and bring him to
JUSTICE?")** The American justice system will never hold Joe Biden to account under the rule of law. But Freedom Watch is and **on March 25th, we empaneled a Citizens Grand Jury to deliver JUSTICE for the American people and INDICT Joe Biden for his crimes:**
* **_We know_** that Joe, Hunter, James, and the rest of Biden crime family enriched themselves by selling influence to Communist China;
* **_We know_** there is ironclad evidence to support Biden's indictment, including incriminating emails, and credible eyewitness testimony from whistleblower Tony Bobulinski; and now
* **_We know_** that Joe Biden, in eight short weeks, through radical executive decrees, has brought the nation to its knees and on the verge of extinction with a flood of border crimes.

**Our empaneled Citizens Grand Jury is faced with _this new evidence_ of sedition and reckless endangerment at the border and will decide based on OVERWHELMING EVIDENCE whether to INDICT the Biden Crime Family.** **[If you're ready to hold Joe, Hunter, and the Biden Crime Family accountable for their treasonous actions, then join us today. The Citizen Grand Jury can only succeed with the support of patriots like you who will stand with us and donate $35, $50, $100, or even $1,000.](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052494:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "If you’re ready to hold Joe, Hunter, and
the Biden Crime Family accountable for their treasonous actions, then join us today. The Citizen Grand Jury can only succeed with the support of
patriots like you who will stand with us and donate $35, $50, $100, or even $1,000.")** The Left is furious that we are INDICTING Joe Biden for his crimes, and they are trying to shut us down just like they did to President Trump so they can bury Biden's crimes. The closer you get to the truth, the louder they scream. We refuse to let the Left suppress the Truth! **[They want to shut us down. Will you help Freedom Watch weather this assault by donating at least $35 to our Defense Fund now so that we can bring the Biden Crime Family to justice?](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052495:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "They want to shut us down. Will
you help Freedom Watch weather this assault by donating at least $35 to our Defense Fund now so that we can bring the Biden Crime Family to justice?")** [](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052493:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "China Puppet")My name is Larry Klayman, and I am the Chairman of Freedom Watch. **I fight for all Americans' rights, and I need your help to continue our mission to fight for our nation.** The President of the United States is a 'Manchurian candidate' who is doing the bidding of Communist China and those who wish to destroy our country, by taking bribes and by throwing the nation into chaos by opening the Southern Border to the invading hordes of hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens pouring across our southern border. **Will there be justice, though, if we don 't do anything? No, it is up to us to deliver justice!** It is time for the American people to take back our legal system, which has been compromised and corrupted by the establishments of both political parties, as our Founding Fathers did in 1776, when they declared independence from King George III, who had taken our criminal justice system away from the colonies back to the Court of St. James. **[For over 20 years, Freedom Watch has delivered justice where others have remained silent and feared to tread. Will you support our indictment of the Biden crime family with a donation of $25, $50, $100 or more today?](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052493:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "For over 20 years, Freedom Watch has delivered justice where
others have remained silent and feared to tread. Will you support our indictment of the Biden crime family with a donation of $25, $50, $100 or more
today?")** If the Democrats cared about crime in the White House, they would be impeaching and having the Department of Justice indict and try Joe and Hunter Biden for allegedly taking bribes from Communist China, along with his treasonous border crimes that endanger Americans and threaten the existence of the nation. The Deep State, the Left and Bidens are all coming after me hard now that they know about this effort. President Trump stood up to them, so they forced him out of office, and impeached him again. **[That's why your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 will go a long way towards bringing the Biden Crime Family to justice!](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052495:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "That’s why your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even
just $50 will go a long way towards bringing the Biden Crime Family to justice!")** The stakes today are even higher than in 1776. King George III was neither a socialist, nor a communist and certainly not an atheist. Now, we need the Citizens Grand Jury to hear the evidence against the Biden crime family so Americans can have a real justice system. We need you to stand with us. **[Can we count on you today?](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052493:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "Can we count on you today?")** For our future, [](http://asg.vervemail7.com/ct/57052493:6jpbQMuNT:m:1:3241986429:08E7E027CC5C6406E2C902B033FD2C00:r "Larry Klayman, Esq.") Larry Klayman, Esq.
Chairman and General Counsel
Freedom Watch, Inc.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Send Shockwaves in DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066890:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "Border Security") Peter, The Biden administration is promising illegal aliens free healthcare, housing, and stimulus checks - and YOU, the taxpayer, are going to pay for it if we don't stop them. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066890:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "Biden Administration")**I have introduced the Protect America First Act to finally secure our border and put American Citizens first, not illegal aliens.** Nancy Pelosi and AOC have been working overtime ever since I got to Congress to silence me and stop me from doing things like this - **you know --actual _work for the people of America._** I won't sit back and watch them destroy our nation and if you share my sentiment, then I need your help. **The end of the quarter is coming up fast and I need to know who is standing with me to protect America and who is not.** **[If you are in this fight to protect our nation from the radical left's agenda, then I need you to make a donation of $35, $50 or even $100 before midnight on March 31st.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066891:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "If
you are in this fight to protect our nation from the radical left’s agenda, then I need you to make a donation of $35, $50 or even $100 before
midnight on March 31st.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066890:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "Deadline") **That is the first quarterly deadline of this year, when all campaigns have to shut their books and file a report with the FEC. These reports are CLOSELY followed, and you can be assured that if my numbers aren 't big enough, the Swamp and their friends in the media will try to claim that America supports Nancy Pelosi's agenda instead of my agenda to put American citizens first.** If my numbers aren't big enough, these establishment types will try to say that their attacks on me have worked, which is why I really need your help to show them that the power in this country still resides with THE PEOPLE. That will make the Democrats fear you and me! **We have a chance to send shock waves all over this nation with a record-breaking haul,[but only if you donate any amount you can afford from $5 to the Federal Maximum amount of $2900 before this deadline.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066890:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "but only if you donate any amount you can afford from $5 to the
Federal Maximum amount of $2900 before this deadline.")** From the bottom of my heart, I appreciate all the outpouring of support so many Americans have sent my way while I've been the center of left-wing attacks. Every day, I'm inspired to keep fighting the left because I know that that American-loving patriots can see through the lies and know that I'm fighting for the people who elected me. Please don't delay--our nation is on the brink of being overrun - we need to show these leftists that Americans want freedom, not the bologna being peddled for a socialist nightmare. **[Donate Today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066891:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "Donate Today.")** God Bless America, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066890:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [FIGHT THE RADICALS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57066890:6LaZTMuNw:m:1:3206719985:492FC2BB9E535239F76962CDE1CDC18E:r "FIGHT THE RADICALS")

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
The initial overview of the legislative session so far is simple, the reckless agenda of the TN GOP threatens the future of our state and we must defeat it. Right now we’re $7,240 away from our end-of-quarter goal. Will you make a donation and help us get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Less than 24 hours after a mass shooting, the Tennessee GOP passed a permitless carry bill that Governor Lee has vowed to sign into law. Not only do more than 80% of Tennesseans think this is a bad idea – even law enforcement is against it. Meanwhile our ‘head in the sand’ governor claimed this reckless bill would ‘make Tennessee safer.’ It's clear, he was talking to the NRA and he's only thinking about his own re-election.
Lee would rather please lobbyists than protect Tennesseeans. The TNDP demands better. That’s why we are working tirelessly to turn Tennessee blue in 2022. Will you join us by making a donation, and helping us raise the resources we need to defeat Bill Lee? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20IN=20GOP=20Chairman?=
subject: Blessings this Palm Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
I hope every Hoosier can join me today in remembering the blessings of the Lord. Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470358?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5c70d50edc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

It’s Palm Sunday, and I hope that every Hoosier can take the opportunity today to be grateful for all the blessings we have in this life.

It’s been a tough year, but I feel incredibly blessed to live in Indiana. I’m also grateful for my community and family, and all Hoosiers who’ve worked together this year to help us get through the pandemic.

And, of course, I’m grateful for Jesus today, who rode into Jerusalem 2,000 years ago with much praise, even knowing that he would pay the price for our sins only days later.

**I’ve been reflecting on the words of John 12:13 today, which read, “So they took branches of palm trees and went out to meet him, crying out, ‘Hosanna! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord, even the King of Israel!’”**

Find comfort in knowing that the Lord is here and He blesses us even during troubling times.

Blessings to all this Palm Sunday!

Kyle Hupfer, IN GOP Chairman
---

name: Urgent Update from our Southern Border
subject: Tony Gonzales
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Let's take a stand here and now for OUR COUNTRY.

Friend, it's Rep. Tony Gonzales (R-TX).

Living in South Texas, I know just how important it is we secure our southern border to keep our communities safe and our nation strong. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Democrats Ignore Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/vJtMTAMuNC

Peter:

Democrats won't let kids go to school or restaurants open at 100%
capacity, but they don't seem to care about COVID-19 when it
comes to illegal migrants crossing the border.

Why?

The answer simple: their priorities are wrong. They care more
about illegal migrants than hard-working American families.

That's why I'm working with the House Freedom Fund to elect
principled conservative leaders to Congress.

You see, electing just any Republican isn't good enough -
especially when it comes to securing our nation's borders. Some
Republicans even want to work with the Democrats to pass amnesty.

This can't happen! We need strong conservatives who will keep
their word and fight for our principles.

Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their
priority candidates with a generous contribution.
(https://secure.housefreedomfund.com/xyb3i/d?c=895b97a9f0fc28fc19699405dc1c46db)

They are helping conservatives like U.S. Reps. Lauren Boebert
(R-CO), Yvette Herrell (R-NM), and Scott Perry (R-PA).

We need their leadership in Washington now more than ever.

The Biden Administration has released migrants into our
neighborhoods without a court date and is using our tax dollars
to pay for illegal migrants to stay in hotels.

And the Democrats have no plan to fix any of it!

President Biden refuses to visit the border, House Democrats
refuse to hold hearings, and the media refuses to hold them
accountable.

Please help us fight back by supporting principled conservatives.
(https://secure.housefreedomfund.com/xyb3i/d?c=895b97a9f0fc28fc19699405dc1c46db)

Together, we can secure our borders and make America great again.

Sincerely,
Image

JIM JORDAN

U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

END OF MONTH DEADLINE
motionmailapp.com
ELECT TRUE CONSERVATIVES
(https://secure.housefreedomfund.com/xyb3i/d?c=895b97a9f0fc28fc19699405dc1c46db)

clean_body: Michelle Steel is a conservative leader that will fight for policies that help all Californians. ** . == Friend, Californians have been through a lot over the last year: skyrocketing costs of living, jobs leaving the state for places like Texas and Florida, students not in schools, and huge tax increases. == Michelle Steel is a conservative leader who is fighting in Washington D.C. for policies that help all Californians. As California's taxpayer champion, Michelle fights for: ✔️ Stopping new taxes and tax increases ✔️ Ending wasteful government spending ✔️ Safely reopening the economy so people can prosper Unfortunately, the Radical Left is doing all it can to try to stop Michelle and her common-sense ideas. They are dropping millions of dollars to unseat her in Congress and replace her with a big government Pelosi ally. == | == Unless we have the support for every grassroots conservative like you, the Far Left will overtake Republicans in vulnerable districts like Michelle's. Michelle was able to beat Nancy Pelosi's hand-picked candidate in 2020 because she had every conservative sticking by her side. She will need your support again to hold back the Democratic attacks. == ==** Team Steel HQ With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bZo3E9AUCW0fr3ogaq6LW9lRe7DyXFsApBd0-vLrPO8SGEwAMK6VsSYtlnOGKSdZ-SXk7T9TngXSF8kySKPpUkbAvNGIXG09yaAHrUNHW7vNH7-b0vzlcIM30yREhlWP5QvvzLgqaSI=&c=c60eul76kJ4PK-tMxPhl_fRvgg1MnnI3ne0v5w7u3T7hxsWFfnGucg==&ch=wosSSbNSeCLNCaK3meAnqqBtW5SBO9Cq_RL0fLqOuBF7E2zyqUN_Iw==).

name: Team Samirah
subject: We have to show up strong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
CNN has already called Virginia’s 2021 elections a proving ground for both parties. Are we going to let the GOP win? Of course not.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26865975/278300661/-1287071472?refcode=em210326_mr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTBiNzUzYi1mNzhmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8JBfOFlU7ZljiWa1aJYHxBW8VknF_JB-DyP7E_zvyo=) Derek, the elections in Virginia in 2021 are going to set the tone for the new decade and already the intensity of these races are heating up. **In fact, CNN has called Virginia the "proving ground" for both parties and it's clear that the GOP is doing everything they can to win back Virginia and undo the progress that we've made together over the last few years. We can't let that happen.** Our first and only filing deadline before the primary is coming up on Wednesday and we know that the Republicans are going to be watching our numbers closely. The local Republicans are already attacking Delegate Ibraheem Samirah -- and if we don't respond in a big way then we can expect them to dump in even more money into the district. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is fighting tirelessly for us in Richmond.**Ibraheem's policies are popular with the voters, but without the help of grassroots donors like you we can't get our message out.[So, if you can, click here to chip in today and help us finish this quarter strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26865976/278300662/-1001649105?refcode=em210328_strong&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTBiNzUzYi1mNzhmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8JBfOFlU7ZljiWa1aJYHxBW8VknF_JB-DyP7E_zvyo=) ** With your help we can build the robust campaign infrastructure we need to win this race and ensure that the Republicans can't roll back the progress we've made here in the Commonwealth. Thanks in advance,
Team Samirah
| Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26865977/278300663/-1287071472?refcode=em210328_strong&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTBiNzUzYi1mNzhmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8JBfOFlU7ZljiWa1aJYHxBW8VknF_JB-DyP7E_zvyo=)

body:

The First Amendment doesn't exist to platforms like Twitter and Facebook who UNAPOLOGETICALLY SILENCE conservatives under the guise of "enforcing community guidelines."

name: Chairman Stepanek
subject: Stop the Democrats' Gun Grab.
body:
**From the Desk of Chairman Stepanek** Derek, This is a bit longer of an email than we normally send, but I wanted to give you an update as to how we're protecting the Second Amendment and Article 2a rights here in New Hampshire. Democrats are doing what they do best: using our mental health crisis to push their extreme agenda to restrict our rights to keep and bear arms. Democrats both Nationally and locally will continue to push their agenda at the cost of your rights - **it’s time to put a stop to this.** As they took back control in D.C. in January the Democrats made it clear that new gun control legislation was an integral part of their agenda. In early March, H.R. 1446 was introduced to the United States House of Representatives, a bill which imposes erroneous restrictions on the Second Amendment. States like Colorado sadly have the most stringent gun control laws on the books but they unfortunately do nothing to prevent criminals from obtaining firearms. These laws only infringe on law-abiding citizens' right to self-defense - the very same patriotic citizens who might prevent tragedies. These proposal just move us one step closer to what Democrats have long sought: a national gun owner registry. It is ironic that the people parroting the phrase “Common Sense Gun Reform” don’t know the first thing about the right to keep and bear arms. Squad Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley (D-MA) was recently quoted as saying, _“The trauma of gun violence in our communities is endless. It’s time we abolish the filibuster and pass meaningful gun control legislation - background checks, automatic weapons ban, gun licensing, and so much more.”_ __ No, Congresswoman Pressley, gun violence is not endless and it’s happening mostly in cities run by Democrats. Any firearm owner could tell you that background checks are already in place. Automatic weapons have been banned in the United States for nearly 40 years. They let slip what they're really after - an end to the filibuster, and free rein to pass whatever legislation they would like. Here in New Hampshire, our local Democrats are no different. Just last year they tried to force through a “Red Flag" law which would have allowed an individual’s firearms to be taken by any judge without due process. Thankfully that bill and other pieces of legislation that infringed on the Second Amendment were vetoed by Governor Chris Sununu. More recently Congressman Chris Pappas has promoted #GunReformNow on twitter, and Ann Kuster has co-sponsored the aforementioned H.R. 1446. If the Democrats have it their way and retake the New Hampshire Legislature in 2022, you can be sure that these radical policies will crop up once more. _By contrast,_ New Hampshire Republicans are taking steps to preserve our Second Amendment and Article 2a rights - even against infringements by the Federal government. Earlier this month, Republicans in the New Hampshire Senate proposed Senate Bill 154 which prohibits the enforcement of any Presidential Executive Order which restricts or regulates the right of the people to keep and bear arms. We view our Second Amendment and Article 2a rights not simply as important rights, but fundamental ones. [Derek, can you donate $20.22, $50, or even $100 today to help us protect the Second Amendment and Article 2a right here in New Hampshire?](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqb5W4qW41pJqq3o6cBtzfaNbqKxjtfGk-2FqSRPPEZHpXM0AP8cecOUNDYquPyIiWop0RI-2FSN1ft9SJRHv4hj70xHTBDF83-2FhBO5GX5gXg1EpA-3DYYQb_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HWMBiENmnfdxWF2HWgt1VUMzeTEoMzSRCHDJoc56OBLq-2BKNZY1M1lQuiAB5-2BIXF4gBwMz9Zrh9DV1HnPrJQCs7PHKz4Resqb3zyrr3vAaYYs2zwKuZjODg87cqsTAIVA1i-2Bq4uyEHDgxTmHub1yU65q-2BL4ubMm0k2Fh85Qc-2FsXhL-2FL-2BLTjcHpkht4PdRmt9aAgFj61nX01-2FnM3S2uEKDNkxzk71eZbAnEvdCEgqvED1JbADuSl3S-2FGz7Eo9TBf5oCHn9qwyYRDZT04R4sKvLYsw-3D-3D) We need to stop the Democrats and their gun grab both in New Hampshire and in D.C. and we need your help to do so. The Democrats are asking for an inch, but they will take a mile as soon as they can.**Once your rights are gone, they’re never going to come back.** [We need your support to fight back against their agenda before it’s too late.](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqb5W4qW41pJqq3o6cBtzfaNbqKxjtfGk-2FqSRPPEZHpXM0AP8cecOUNDYquPyIiWop0RI-2FSN1ft9SJRHv4hj70xHTBDF83-2FhBO5GX5gXg1EpA-3D6nk2_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HWMBiENmnfdxWF2HWgt1VUMzeTEoMzSRCHDJoc56OBLq-2BKNZY1M1lQuiAB5-2BIXF4gBwMz9Zrh9DV1HnPrJQCs7A0PWQFbYCL-2FCm1znaPAQ679kVT652RXh4vPB-2FSHFFrr7-2FrT-2BnzX7in86mgZJC4uoefBtqwZJF9KclVjJ99uttQjmZgl7kZZSmUXG4Z0icsN-2FdNuJSsyWr6O98lqFHC3i0nQPLeBp-2BblA9GHLkkG13o8hCBbKYLl1SvbfIbmcpYXT10mhVtKxFG8yrycl38HfA-3D-3D) Regards, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman __ _[P.S. The Democrats are using any excuse necessary to get what they already wanted - gun control. They are already exploiting the tragedies in Colorado and Georgia to propose sweeping gun-control measures which would never have prevented these acts from happening, and would only serve to harm law-abiding citizens. We need your support to fight back and stop the Democrats' proposed gun grab.](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqb5W4qW41pJqq3o6cBtzfaNbqKxjtfGk-2FqSRPPEZHpXM0AP8cecOUNDYquPyIiWop0RI-2FSN1ft9SJRHv4hj70xHTBDF83-2FhBO5GX5gXg1EpA-3D6V2u_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HWMBiENmnfdxWF2HWgt1VUMzeTEoMzSRCHDJoc56OBLq-2BKNZY1M1lQuiAB5-2BIXF4gBwMz9Zrh9DV1HnPrJQCs7JnSczPrAD0knqX0SGLZpPCVXdIMHar666adcl22qpQssfX7qOMaatVKGs-2BA1QqHZ9yb7rvmX6b45WWsgDxNs0Hhwd-2F3AqUUEBrDwtqXUaZ73m3aiEMUBpUu-2FoHnrygcwHnX4ZL4-2BypplR5FpTplWafAKuiXu9yWeL5V-2Fu3HLgSDvE4RfVb4jmwkrPOL0y8OGg-3D-3D)_

name: Giffords.org
subject: The three things you need to know about our work to pass universal background checks!
body:
#

Friends, here are three things you need to know ahead of our FEC fundraising deadline next week:
1. As Americans have dealt with a global pandemic, they've also had to face a worsening gun violence crisis.
2. In order to prevent tragedies like the ones that took place in Atlanta or Boulder, we need the Senate to pass universal background checks.
3. The best way we can do that is by hitting our goals so we can keep the pressure on the Senate to act.

As we begin to look for a feeling of normalcy as more and more Americans are getting vaccinated, mass shootings should not become our new normal.
The House passed universal background checks this month, which means it's now crucial we push the Senate to pass a background checks bill as well. When lives are at stake, every moment matters. Which is why we need to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving bipartisan background checks bill that will be voted on in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad733/1419815305/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210328-1-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad734/1419815305/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210328-1-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad737/1419815305/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210328-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad736/1419815305/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210328-1-full") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad709/1419815305/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210328-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad708/1419815305/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210328-1-full") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad735/1419815305/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210328-1-full")
---|---
Passing universal background checks is a necessary step in preventing gun violence. We need your help to push the Senate to make this a priority.
That's why your donation makes all the difference. As this month comes to a close, we've calculated that we need to hit a 25,000 donation goal to give us the resources necessary to push for change.
Let's save lives together.
Thank you in advance for chipping in,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad733/1419815305/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMjgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210328-1-full")**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee111/78fba3aa/6213c986/50aad70b/1419815305/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
subject: UPDATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
California’s hope lies in getting Gavin Newsom out of office. Will you help? Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/e6bac8294f3f9a45c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, We are down to the wire, and need everyone on board to help us defeat Gavin Newsom this November. **Our first critical deadline of the campaign is coming up fast — we still need to raise $15,625 to hit our goal before MIDNIGHT on March 31st! Can you make a grassroots donation right now to help?** [**CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/110228e3f79df83fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Californians are sick of Gavin Newsom and his failure to lead our great state. He’s getting recalled, which is great news, but it means Kevin’s campaign has shifted into warp speed to get out the vote. Newsom is a hypocrite who doesn’t seem to care one bit about the damage he’s caused our state. In fact, he even pointed out that his millionaire friends have only gotten richer during the pandemic! That’s the problem. Gavin Newsom is picking and choosing winners and losers. It’s time to give every Californian the chance to win —not just the elite and their buddies. **It’s time for new leadership and a California Comeback. Kevin Faulconer knows how to take a broken and corrupt system and make it work for the people once again. He did it as the mayor of San Diego, and he’s ready to do it as our next governor.** We need your help to mobilize our grassroots team to spread our message of hope in California. There will be a better tomorrow in the Golden State —but first we need to get Gavin OUT of office. **[Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or whatever you can right now to help us hit our critical end-of-quarter goal and DEFEAT Gavin Newsom!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/f549e624522d9d7fc3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Thanks for your help,
Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/04c6086d2f6f6de5c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/bb158f9161e30c5fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/88b4a468a62d6625c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $75 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/aa516dab8cd31878c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/84b7d64333cd2c8ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) id:2021-03-23-13:36:46:250t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/c0de19c1d955c51bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/652bb3aa601aaf16c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9d2087cf10e1065a/f48e18bd5241210ec3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Friend, it's Carter with Team Young. Did you see this headline? Nancy Pelosi and her Democratic allies are fundraising at a record pace to expand their Majority in Congress. To be specific -- the Democrats have raised over $18.4 MILLION since the beginning of 2021. A massive cash overhaul like this is enough to completely capsize campaigns in vulnerable districts like ours. That's why we set achievable goals throughout the year. And that's why it's absolutely critical we reach all of them. Our end of quarter goal is just days away, so I did some digging to check our progress. **I hate to say it, but WE 'RE BEHIND by 261 donations.** But do not hold out hope, Friend. We have a plan to turn the tide. We've authorized our highest match offer yet until midnight tonight! All gifts (no matter the size) will qualify for a **5X-MATCH.** It doesn't get any better than this. clean_body: "" "" "" Team -- we're so close to reaching our goal. Generous donors agreed to match grassroots donations this weekend, but only if we can raise $4,751 more before midnight tonight. We're not going to lie, it's been a tough couple weeks for our campaign. First, back-to-back polls showed Maggie Hassan falling behind. Then, Mitch McConnell's super PAC announced a massive seven-figure ad campaign against Maggie and other vulnerable Democrats. And on top of it all, our fundraising numbers have actually slowed. There's too much on the line to fall short this weekend. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Thank you so much for being with us in this fight. Your support couldn't be more important, and we couldn't be more grateful. -- Team Maggie ""

name: Matt's iPhone
subject: We’re falling behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
I wanted to send a quick personal message today to you today because as things stand right now, our fundraising efforts appear to be falling behind.
That's bad news for anyone who wants to see a swift end to the Biden Border Crisis, the Forever Wars overseas, or job-killing, globalist trade deals.
Help Us Get Back on Track Here: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-falling-behind-q1](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ngqlWAIlEmgluzKLkB1uz3PKgxd01Pdi0cOZ8XZGG1UP6veVaOkGW0WGso8ANf3_tdqwlEVi-djEb30rKNXeHF-4FgcJtW6amAVIWgD5HMIATOMlItQxF4dCoQXuPjioOVdkhqN39GbbaXP0HLn8nV-GVXAR36YwBEZVYdpAVA6UPq-D27Gl-0PQrP0gmJuu&c=B5rE7u_KzgudmIcvPSCxHU5u15heJUK3HQhKLRND8a0VBTbAddGimw==&ch=DgitoQzTs96qlFzjmNuZq8peihzBqhJR6b8rQocmBaz5dBvBI7e4qw==)
Our adversaries are lining their campaign coffers with the money of special interest PACs, and when they already had the mainstream media and Big Tech censorship overlords on their side, it's clear that we can't afford to be outpaced the way we are now.
This is a pivotal time for the America First movement. If we want to continue what Donald Trump worked to spearhead, and push back against a corrupt ruling-class Establishment, then getting back on track today is crucial.
Will you help my team's efforts to reach our quarterly fundraising goals by chipping in as little as $5 today?
Chip in $5: donation link - [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-falling-behind-q1](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ngqlWAIlEmgluzKLkB1uz3PKgxd01Pdi0cOZ8XZGG1UP6veVaOkGW0WGso8ANf3_iIOVlg8kAyR8BWLXpL4YM0DI3T9NJ5lrasVqqMDtm-d_xKTDGB9Awt-JwQLzKakzSv3XRVhchvs5V1ZAMCVHWX5IfsXC4UPmkerN67MkdiBhiNgF8arI0sBNv0A5Kdb10040M8zY5Do=&c=B5rE7u_KzgudmIcvPSCxHU5u15heJUK3HQhKLRND8a0VBTbAddGimw==&ch=DgitoQzTs96qlFzjmNuZq8peihzBqhJR6b8rQocmBaz5dBvBI7e4qw==)
Thanks for the support,
-Matt Gaetz
Sent from my iPhone

### Christie55 In The News
---
| [ ](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=b7dab54fd0&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**The Columbus Dispatch**

**Opinion: Governor's plan will 'substantially' lower prescription drug costs**
By: Chris Christie

Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine’s recently proposed budget continues his leadership in addressing the challenges of the pandemic, accelerating economic recovery and meeting the needs of Ohioans. The budget proposes an important health care reform that would reduce prescription drug costs for patients, public employees and taxpayers.

This innovation championed by DeWine would increase competition in the state’s selection of pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) — the middlemen that manage prescription drug benefits — to lower what they charge for medications. It’s called a PBM reverse auction modeled after a successful program we enacted in New Jersey, which is saving taxpayers approximately $500 million each year. Forward-looking states like Ohio are pursuing this to benefit taxpayers and public employees.
_[Continue Reading](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=fe50f73dca&e=65ae29fa7e)_
|
---
| [ ](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=d65a8a6a64&e=65ae29fa7e)
---

**"More listening and less attacking"**

Republican Chris Christie and Democrat Rahm Emanuel may have disparate political views, but they agree on one key point: we need to talk to each other more.

“Our politics in Washington sometimes exacerbate our differences,” Emanuel says. “As a former legislator, President Biden knows that today’s opponents can be tomorrow’s allies. He knows that if you disagree, you don’t do it in a way that breaks off all communications.”

Christie cites advice he received as a U.S. attorney: “It’s much harder to hate in person.”

“Because of the culture in Washington, that’s advice we’ve gotten away from,” he says. “People don’t talk to each other as much as they used to. That’s where the relationships Biden created during his 36 years in the Senate and his time as vice president can lead to greater opportunities for bipartisanship.”

Emanuel and Christie see opportunities for collaboration in infrastructure spending, research and development, climate change, job training, and education.
_[Continue Reading](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=dff52f75e8&e=65ae29fa7e)_
|

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Democrats Exposed - Here's What They Just Said
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=1)
---
Peter \--
### Politicians are always trying to wiggle around things.
As I mentioned in the last email, one candidate in the governor's race, Mayor Mike Murphy, signed the Never Again Pledge while the other one, Scott Jensen, DENIED YOU a written promise that it will be the #1 priority for him. Scott challenged us to debate the Never Again pledge that you and I expect the next governor to sign. So I accepted it; faced him head-on as your voice of what we demand, and the importance of Ending Walz’ Emergency Powers and passing the **Never Again Bill**. While he is still thumbing his nose at us with not signing the pledge, he did do **the bare minimum and called on the Legislature****to NOT PASS A BUDGET until Walz’ powers are gone and the Never Again Bill passes.** Here's [Scott agreeing](https://www.action4liberty.com/scott_jensen_calls_on_legislature_to_pass_no_budget_until_never_again_bill_passes?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=2) with the obvious: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/scott_jensen_calls_on_legislature_to_pass_no_budget_until_never_again_bill_passes?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=3) Now this doesn't give him a pass for not signing the pledge, but it's clear to the most casual observers that the Senate Republicans need to hold the line and not sell us out! They failed us on the Debt Bill in October. They failed to Fire Jan Malcom, the HHS Commissioner attacking our businesses. We cannot accept failure any longer. **No Deals. No compromise. And NO BUDGET until Emergency Powers are ended and the Never Again Bill is passed.** And it's 100% on Sen. Maj. Leader Paul Gazelka.

Now, while I was discussing this important issue with Scott Jensen on Munson's podcast, Con Artist Democrats Dave Lislegard and Julie Sandstede were whining, complaining and making outrageous accusations about you and me in their virtual townhall. **At one point they made the absurd accusation that we are being investigated by the FBI and BCA. I guess they don't only con people on their votes, but they also con them on the seriousness of criminal investigations!** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/delusional_democrats?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=4) And that's why I'm calling on you to help us fend off these baseless attacks and political retribution from the Political Class. The central theme of Lislegard and Sandstede's complaints is that Action 4 Liberty raises money, then takes that money to hire doorknockers, which in turns get voters to contact them by phone and email accounts that don't get screened by Capitol bureaucrats. At one point, Lislegard even says "obviously they are working hard".
# HE NAILED IT!
**You and I are working HARD because the small business owners in Minnesota deserve a group willing to fight for them against Walz' tyranny. We are woking HARD because someone needs to stop the insanity of universal mask mandates! And we are working HARD because we owe it to you to ensure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN!** While their pal lobbyist legislator Kurt Daudt is comforting them by calling us frauds, we are busy doing the one thing the Republicans in St Paul don't seem at all interested in doing: working hard by putting pressure on the most vulnerable Democrats in the House.
I honestly feel bad for Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard. They clearly want the political pain to end. Their voters are outraged by what they are doing. Trust me, we know! But the Metro Democrat Bosses have told them to “get in line” and protect Walz’ Emergency Powers or else. They want Walz’ powers in place so they can get Republicans in St Paul giving them everything under the sun in the budget, like a TAX INCREASE!

Lislegard complained that Action 4 Liberty is hiring doorknockers in his district and telling them to contact him about Ending Walz’ Emergency Powers. In other words, we are doing EXACTLY what we told you we would do with your generous donations and it is causing him PAIN! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=5 "Help Us Bring More Pain!") [Help Us Bring More Pain!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=6)
---

We absolutely will not STOP bringing the heat as long as these dangerous Emergency Powers are still on the books. But we need your help.
Do what Dave Lislegard and Julie Sandstede hate the most. Donate to help us ramp up the pressure and put more boots on the ground. Let's make sure every voter in their district knows how they protect Governor Walz instead of standing up for their rights!
[**Please help us with a $25, $50 or $100 donation. Or pay for a week of one doorknocker, gasoline and literature with a donation of $1,000. Let's keep the pressure up so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers NOW!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=7)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_exposed_he&n=10), software for leaders.
